name: Pilot Travel Center #599
description: Full-service Pilot travel center at I-90 Exit 192 in Murdo with diesel lanes, DEF, a CAT Scale, Subway, showers and truck parking; the main truck stop for the Murdo area.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Murdo
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Pilot Travel Center at I-90 Exit 192 in Murdo; open 24/7.

name: Coffee Cup Fuel Stop - Vivian
description: South Dakota-based Coffee Cup Fuel Stop at I-90 Exit 212 (US Hwy 83) in Vivian with separate semi diesel pumps, showers, a convenience store and Caribou Coffee.

name: Prairie Post
description: Independent fuel and convenience stop at I-90 Exit 225 in Presho with diesel, a deli and a small amount of truck parking.

name: Al's Oasis
description: Landmark family-run stop at I-90 Exit 260 near the Missouri River (Oacoma/Chamberlain) with a restaurant, store, fuel and a dedicated truck & RV parking lot.

name: Cenex Station - Oacoma
description: Cenex fuel stop at I-90 Exit 260 in Oacoma with diesel lanes, Arby's, a store and roughly 25 truck parking spaces near the Missouri River.

name: Oasis Pump & Pack
description: 24-hour self-serve fuel and convenience store at I-90 Exit 260 in Oacoma with truck parking.

name: Coffee Cup Fuel Stop #4
description: Coffee Cup Fuel Stop at I-90 Exit 310 and US 281 in Plankinton with about 80 truck spaces, 5 fuel lanes, 4 showers, a deli, laundry and driver lounge.

name: Cubby's Mitchell West
description: Cubby's Cenex convenience store and fuel stop at I-90 Exit 330 (SD-37/Hwy 38) on the west side of Mitchell with diesel, a deli, showers, driver lounge and truck parking.

name: I-90 Travel Center
description: Large 24-hour travel center at I-90 Exit 332 (Hwy 37) in Mitchell with diesel, roughly 250 truck spaces, a CAT Scale, showers, laundry, tire/lube service bays, Marlin's Roadhouse Grill and Subway.

name: CAT Scale at I-90 Travel Center Mitchell
description: Certified CAT Scale at the I-90 Travel Center at I-90 Exit 332 in Mitchell.

name: Mega Wash Truck & Trailer Wash
description: Long-established Mitchell wash with semi tractor-trailer/RV bays (about 13 ft wide, 80 ft long, 14 ft high) plus self-serve bays, near I-90 in Mitchell.

name: Al's Diesel Repair
description: Diesel and heavy-truck repair shop serving the Chamberlain area along I-90 near the Missouri River crossing.

name: Mitchell Towing and Recovery
description: 24-hour towing and roadside assistance (light/medium duty, winch-outs, tire service, jump-starts, fuel delivery) serving the I-90 corridor around Mitchell.

name: Super 8 by Wyndham Murdo
description: Motel just off I-90 Exit 192 in Murdo offering free parking for cars, trucks and buses.

name: Range Country Lodging
description: Pet-friendly Murdo motel near I-90 Exit 192 with free on-site self-parking that accommodates trucks and buses.

name: Belvidere Rest Area (Eastbound)
description: SDDOT eastbound I-90 rest area near Belvidere (mile marker 165) with truck and passenger parking, restrooms, water and a picnic area.

name: Belvidere Rest Area (Westbound)
description: SDDOT westbound I-90 rest area near Belvidere (mile marker 166) with truck and passenger parking, restrooms, water and a picnic area.

name: Vivian Rest Area (Eastbound)
description: SDDOT eastbound I-90 rest area near Vivian (mile marker 218) with car and truck parking, restrooms, a picnic area, water and an RV dump station.

name: Vivian Rest Area (Westbound)
description: SDDOT westbound I-90 rest area near Vivian (mile marker 221) with car and truck parking, restrooms, a picnic area, water and an RV dump station.

name: Chamberlain Lewis & Clark Welcome Center & Rest Area
description: Bidirectional I-90 welcome center/rest area at mile marker 264 overlooking the Missouri River at Chamberlain, with truck and passenger parking, restrooms, Lewis & Clark interpretive exhibits and river overlooks.

name: White Lake Rest Area
description: SDDOT I-90 rest area near White Lake (mile marker 301) with car and truck parking and restrooms.
